meta.footEn: Data snapshot: 2026-07-04 · Garmin fenix 8 via Freddy

en.c5d: computed from sleep, HRV, RHR, stress & recent load
en.rec: Late night: lights-out at 00:11 brought just 5h13 (score 74) — but the sleep itself was dense. Deep hit an excellent 1h34 (30% of the night), REM 1h08, and you were awake for a single minute. The autonomic picture held steady too: HRV 39 (−2 under the 7-day baseline of 41), RHR 54 (−2 vs yesterday), and morning stress is a calm 21 after yesterday's stressy 43. Nights are logged by the evening they start, so this one sits under Fri 3 (Friday–Saturday); the untracked night is Thursday's, and the chart shows the seven most recent recorded nights. Today is trap-bar deadlift per plan — the short night says lift smart: warm up fully, cap the top set, keep total volume moderate, and bank an early night tonight.

hr.c5d: izračunato iz sna, HRV-a, RHR-a, stresa i opterećenja
hr.rec: Kasna noć: gašenje svjetla u 00:11 donijelo je samo 5h13 (ocjena 74) — ali san je bio gust. Duboki je dosegao izvrsnih 1h34 (30% noći), REM 1h08, a budan si bio jednu jedinu minutu. Autonomna slika je stabilna: HRV 39 (−2 ispod 7-dnevne osnovice 41), RHR 54 (−2 vs jučer), a jutarnji stres miran 21 nakon jučerašnjih stresnih 43. Noći se bilježe prema večeri kojom počinju, pa ova stoji pod Pet 3 (petak–subota); nezabilježena je noć s četvrtka, a graf prikazuje sedam najnovijih zabilježenih noći. Danas je po planu trap-bar mrtvo dizanje — kratka noć kaže: diži pametno. Zagrij se temeljito, ograniči završnu seriju, drži ukupni volumen umjerenim i večeras lezi rano.
